data.body: Follow-up (user-requested, discovered from epic 5ca8's step-budget trip): PR #86 — (1) doubled completion-verifier floor _VERIFY_MIN_STEPS 240->480 in llm/completion.py; (2) added step-usage telemetry at the PydanticAIRunner chokepoint — _extract_usage now captures RunUsage.requests into _usage; success log emits steps=N/limit budget=M; budget-trip WARNING names request_limit+max_iterations. Covers completion-verifier + plan-review uniformly. Tests: extended test_extract_usage; new test_completion_budget.py (floor=480 applied + operator-higher-wins). make lint+mypy clean; 159-test sweep green. Auto-merge enabled.
